subcodes.first_line: The primary purpose of God - exalted be His glory - in creating mankind hath ever been, and will continue to be, the knowledge of Him; and since the gate of the knowledge of His Essence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مقصود حق جل جلاله از خلق در رتبه اولیه معرفت بوده و هست و چون باب معرفت ذات
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @station of the Manifestation of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @knowledge; recognition of God
